entries.title: Hospital Aftermath Tracks Bodies And Truths

content.fact: The immediate aftermath centers injury, grief, and processing rather than instant return to school life.
content.injection: Use hospital aftermath scenes to slow down; characters should be hurt, exhausted, and absorbing truth.
